title: ammannia floribunda
intro: Ammannia floribunda, also known as Swamp Rose-mallow or Swamp Hibiscus, is a flowering plant species native to Africa, Asia, and Australia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Ammannia floribunda has various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antipyretic. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal use, with some communities also using its flowers for dye and ornamental purposes.
